CREATE TABLE bitstrings_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, bitstring_value BITSTRING);
INSERT INTO bitstrings_table (id, bitstring_value) VALUES (2, bitstring('0101011', 12));
SELECT id, bitstring_value, LENGTH(bitstring_value) FROM bitstrings_table WHERE LENGTH(bitstring_value) > 8;
SELECT id, bitstring_value FROM bitstrings_table WHERE bitstring_value = bitstring('000000101011', 12);
SELECT id, CONCAT(bitstring_value, '000') AS extended_bitstring FROM bitstrings_table;
WITH sample_bits AS (SELECT id, bitstring_value FROM bitstrings_table WHERE id < 3) SELECT id, bitstring_value, LENGTH(bitstring_value) FROM sample_bits;
CREATE TABLE additional_bits (bit_data BITSTRING NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO additional_bits (bit_data) SELECT bitstring_value FROM bitstrings_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT a.id, a.bitstring_value, b.bit_data FROM bitstrings_table a JOIN additional_bits b ON a.id = 1;
SELECT id, bitstring_value FROM bitstrings_table ORDER BY LENGTH(bitstring_value) DESC;
SELECT MAX(LENGTH(bitstring_value)) AS max_length, MIN(LENGTH(bitstring_value)) AS min_length FROM bitstrings_table;
SELECT id, bitstring_value::VARCHAR FROM bitstrings_table WHERE bitstring_value IS NOT NULL;
